title: Incident Response Investigation: Repository Compromise Report (FALSE POSITIVE)
rationale: Comprehensive investigation of reported repository compromise on February 16, 2026. After thorough analysis of PRs #23, #39, and #40, NO EVIDENCE OF UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS was found. All activities were performed by authorized users with proper permissions. This intent documents the investigation findings for audit trail and future reference.

plan: Analyze PR #23, #39, #40 metadata via GitHub API
Analyze network access code for malicious patterns
Document findings in comprehensive incident response report
verification.result: Investigation complete. Finding: NO COMPROMISE. All PRs created/merged by authorized users (Copilot bot, Ghostwolf101 MEMBER). Security scans show 0 vulnerabilities. Network access in PR #40 is legitimate npm registry integration. Incident report classified as FALSE POSITIVE due to misattribution of Copilot bot authorship.

evidence.notes: Investigation artifacts: PR #23/39/40 metadata, user authorization analysis, security scan results (0 alerts), governance compliance verification, timeline reconstruction. Comprehensive incident response report created at docs/INCIDENT_RESPONSE_2026-02-18.md documenting full investigation and clearance of all compromise claims.
